perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a large retail warehouse with a female main character standing in front of a massive pile of plush dolls. She is holding a large purple Kuromi plush and a pink Hello Kitty plush, smiling at them. (2) She brings the Kuromi plush closer to the camera, pointing at its purple eye mask and soft texture. (3) The camera pans down to reveal a green Luigi plush partially buried among the Sanrio characters. (4) The woman continues to hug and stroke the purple plush while looking at the camera. (5) The camera tilts upwards to focus on a price tag hanging from the ceiling, then pans back to the woman who is holding the Kuromi plush one last time.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music starts immediately. A female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, expressing how cute the plushies are. (2) A male voice (off-screen) responds playfully, teasing her about her bias towards the Kuromi character over Hello Kitty. (3) Both characters laugh as they spot the Luigi doll; the ambient sound is low, suggesting a relatively quiet store environment. (4) The female voice describes the feel of the doll as 'very comfortable'. (5) The male voice mentions the price and suggests waiting for a discount, as the music reaches a concluding phrase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '闖入陌生男子?' (Breaking into a stranger's territory?) - Hook text at the top of the screen. (2) '酷洛米 & Kitty 趴趴睡大娃娃' (Kuromi & Kitty Sleeping Large Dolls) - Decorative title in a yellow and pink bubble. (3) Functional subtitles throughout the video translate the spoken dialogue between the onscreen woman and the offscreen man. (4) '瑪麗歐' (Mario) and '路易吉' (Luigi) - Decorative text appearing with yellow star-like bursts when the character is seen. (5) '789元' and '直接折200' - Functional text indicating the price and estimated discount.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Character Comparison -> Discovery of Hidden Item -> Product Detail -> Price Reveal

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible; no other people clearly identifiable in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with puffy sleeves and a black vest/jumper over it.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and rows of products including bicycles and outdoor gear visible in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Comparison -> Discovery -> Detailed Review -> Price Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle vlog and shopping recommendation for Costco members. It aims to showcase the cuteness and quality of new Sanrio plush arrivals while using a lighthearted, humorous interaction between a couple to engage the audience. It provides practical information such as price and softness to encourage viewers to purchase the item.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of products with pricing information and positive emotional reaction in a specific store (Costco).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: On-screen/off-screen banter between partners, variety-show style text bubbles.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of text overlays to maintain engagement in a short-form format. The presence of the Luigi plush acts as a 'comedic break' in the middle of a very feminine-coded scene.
